mapper.sql: share_id, entry_id, share_token, password_hash, expires_at, status, created_by, created_at
mapper.select: select from drive_share where entry_id = #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by created_at desc, share_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into drive_share(share_id, entry_id, share_token, password_hash, expires_at, status, created_by, created_at) values( #{shareId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{shareToken}, #{passwordHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{status}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: update drive_share set entry_id = #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, share_token = #{shareToken}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, status = #{status}, created_by = #{createdBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where share_id = #{shareId, jdbcType=BINARY}
